title: Hydraulic Press
description: A hydraulic press for making blocks and items more renewable.
body:
![downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fconnorcode.com%2Fapi%2Fdownloads%3Fmodrinth%3DPAOybFai%26curseforge%3D1286221&query=%24%5B%27total-human%27%5D&label=downloads&style=for-the-badge&color=0dc362)

A hydraulic press for making blocks and items more renewable.

[LIVE FACTORY VIDEO](https://us-east-1.tixte.net/uploads/cdn.avatarka.ge/explorer_NmYzlU4cYMU7ubMXoAWhkU4m.mp4)

<details>
<summary>HOW TO BUILD</summary>

<details>
<summary>HYDRAULIC PRESS</summary>

![hydraulic_press](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b41eef8a4a20372a91032cd0789582e0e8d91e99.png)
- Y: 5 Item Frame
- Y: 4 Sticky Piston (facing south)
- Y: 3 **TIER BLOCK**
- Y: 1 **RECIPE ITEM** (check the recipes dropdown)
- Y: 0 Anvil

**TIER BLOCKS**
- Copper Block (~+10% success rate; 320 press durability)
- Iron Block (~+25% success rate; 1200 press durability)
- Gold Block (~+45% success rate; 84 press durability)
- Diamond Block (~+70% success rate; Unbreakable)
- Netherite Block (~+100% success rate; Unbreakable)

</details>

<details>
<summary>HEAT PRESS</summary>
  
![heat_press](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f110b661e7d3abaca9f2b8a4587ae756b7a4a70.png)
- Y: 5 Chest Minecart (requires **FUEL**)
- Y: 4 Sticky Piston (facing south)
- Y: 3 Magma Block (600 press durability)
- Y: 1 **RECIPE ITEM** (check the recipes dropdown)
- Y: 0 Anvil

**FUEL ITEMS**
- Blaze Rod (32 presses)
- Bucket of Lava (200 presses)

</details>

<details>
<summary>WET PRESS</summary>

![wet_press](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3d3459ccf255dff5bc6210a8d3ce177a1dc5d81.png)
- Y: 5 Chest Minecart (requires **FUEL**)
- Y: 4 Sticky Piston (facing south)
- Y: 3 Wet Sponge (1200 press durability)
- Y: 1 **RECIPE ITEM** (check the recipes dropdown)
- Y: 0 Anvil

**FUEL ITEMS**
- Bucket of Water (200 presses)

</details>

<details>
<summary>DYE PRESS</summary>

![dye_press](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/736e3656440ddf176962463cc2eb2ed188e41f29.png)
- Y: 5 Chest Minecart (requires **FUEL**)
- Y: 4 Sticky Piston (facing south)
- Y: 3 Wool (1200 press durability)
- Y: 1 **RECIPE ITEM** (check the recipes dropdown)
- Y: 0 Anvil

**FUEL ITEMS**
- Dye (16 presses)

</details>

</details>


<details>
<summary>RECIPES</summary>
<details>
<summary>HYDRAULIC PRESS</summary>

- Stone -> Cobblestone (+20% success)
- Deepslate -> Cobbled Deepslate (+20% success)
- Cobblestone -> Gravel
- Mossy Cobblestone -> Gravel
- Cobbled Deepslate -> Gravel
- Gravel -> Sand (-55% success)
- Sand -> Sandstone (+25% success)
- Red Sand -> Red Sandstone (+25% success)
- **[X]** Glass -> ???

<details>
<summary>TIER SPECIFIC EXCLUSIVES</summary>
  
- Amethyst Block -> Budding Amethyst (35% success; requires Diamond)
- Blackstone -> Gilded Blackstone (50% success; requires Gold)
- Obsidian -> Crying Obsidian (16-32% success; requires Diamond+)
  
</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>HEAT PRESS</summary>
  
- Basalt -> Smooth Basalt
- Blue Ice -> Basalt
- Clay -> Terracotta
- Cobbled Deepslate -> Deepslate
- Cobblestone -> Stone
- Dyed Terracotta -> Glazed Terracotta (retains dyed color)
- Netherrack -> Nether Bricks
- Quartz Block -> Smooth Quartz
- Raw Copper Block -> Copper Block
- Raw Gold Block -> Gold Block
- Raw Iron Block -> Iron Block
- Red Sand -> Glass
- Red Sandstone -> Smooth Red Sandstone
- Sand -> Glass
- Sandstone -> Smooth Sandstone
- Wet Sponge -> Sponge
- Wood Log -> Coal Block
- **[X]** Wood Planks -> FIRE
- **[X]** Wool -> FIRE
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>WET PRESS</summary>
  
- Concrete Powder -> Concrete (retains powder color)
- Dirt -> Mud
- Coarse Dirt -> Mud
- Rooted Dirt -> Mud
- Dead Coral Block -> Coral Block
- Magma Block -> Obsidian
- Sponge -> Wet Sponge
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>DYE PRESS</summary>
  
- Concrete/Concrete Powder -> (re-dye to any color based on dye fuel)
- Glass/Stained Glass -> (re-dye to any color based on dye fuel)
- Terracotta/Glazed Terracotta -> (re-dye to any color based on dye fuel)
- Concrete Powder -> (re-dye to any color based on dye fuel)
- Wool -> (re-dye to any color based on dye fuel)
  
</details>

</details>
